hero.heading: Save More. Enjoy More. Join Red Coupons Today!
hero.description:
Discover exclusive deals, special discounts - all in one app.
Membership is FREE!

steps.label: Browse exclusive coupon deals near you
Save coupons directly to Your wallet
Earn coupon credits with every purchase
You create coupons for your business
Customers redeem them at your location
You gain new customers and increase your sales

testimonials.heading: Shoppers and partner businesses speak for us

testimonials.name: Andrés Gómez
testimonials.comment: I went out with my friends over the weekend and used a coupon to buy some drinks. I saved over $60,000, and they even gave me credit for more coupons just for the purchase!

testimonials.name: Daniela Restrepo
testimonials.comment: A coupon popped up just as I was browsing clothes at my favorite store, and I took the chance to buy a dress I'd been eyeing for a while. With 20% off, I didn't even think twice. For real, I didn't have to wait until the end of the month!

testimonials.name: Ernesto Martínez
testimonials.comment: Since joining as a partner store, I've seen more customers walk in without spending more on ads. The coupon system is easy to manage and brings results.

benefits.heading: Whether you buy or sell, we have something for you

benefits: Get exclusive coupons from partner brands and businesses.
Use them in your city or when you travel.
Earn coupon credits for every purchase or referral.
Publish as many coupons as you want.
Reach more local customers and visitors.
Boost your sales without expensive campaigns.

subscription.heading: Join the thousands of shoppers and businesses already saving and growing!

server_responses.message: Check your email for an invitation

accordion.question: How do I use a coupon?
accordion.answer: Select the coupon you want to use from the "My Coupons" section and, from your phone, either activate the QR code to be scanned at the store or partner location.

accordion.question: Can I gift coupons?
accordion.answer:
Yes. Just click the "Send gift" button on the coupon you want to gift, enter the recipient's email, and you're done.

The person will receive a notification by email.

  • If they're already registered, the coupon will automatically appear in their "My Coupons" section, ready to use.
  • If they're not registered, the email will include an invitation to create an account and be able to use the coupon.

accordion.question: In which cities can I use coupons?
accordion.answer: Coupons can be used at partner stores located in: Bogotá, Medellín, La Ceja, and Cali in Colombia, and Asunción in Paraguay.

accordion.question: How do I contact Customer Support?
accordion.answer: You can write to us at info@coupons.com or fill out the form available on our contact page.

terms_of_use.heading: Terms of Use
terms_of_use.intro: Welcome to Red Coupons. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to the following Terms of Use. Please read them carefully.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.text: By using our website, purchasing coupons, or subscribing to our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.

sections.heading: 2. Services Provided
sections.text: Red Coupons allows users to browse, purchase, and redeem digital coupons offered by third-party merchants. Coupons are provided as-is and may be subject to additional terms set by the issuing merchant.

sections.heading: 3. User Accounts and Eligibility
sections.text:
• You must be at least 18 years old or of legal age in your jurisdiction to use this service.
  • You agree to provide accurate, complete, and updated information when registering or making a purchase.
  • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activity under your account.

sections.heading: 4. Payment Processing
sections.text:
• All payments are processed securely through third-party providers such as Stripe.
  • Red Coupons does not store or handle your credit card or banking details.
  • All transactions are subject to the terms and conditions of the payment processor.

sections.heading: 5. Coupon Use and Restrictions
sections.text:
• Coupons may only be used as described and before the listed expiration date (if applicable).
  • Red Coupons is not responsible for honoring or fulfilling the offers of third-party merchants.
  • Any misuse, resale, or unauthorized distribution of coupons is strictly prohibited.

sections.heading: 6. Refunds and Cancellations
sections.text:
• All coupon purchases are final unless otherwise stated.
  • Refunds may be issued at our sole discretion or according to the merchant's policy.
  • If a coupon is found to be invalid due to an error on our part, we will work to provide a replacement or refund.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.text:
• All content on the Red Coupons website, including logos, branding, and visuals, is the property of Red Coupons or its licensors.
  • You may not copy, reproduce, or use our content without written permission.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.text:
To the fullest extent permitted by law:

  • Red Coupons shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our services.
  • We make no guarantees as to the availability or uninterrupted operation of our platform.

sections.heading: 9. Termination
sections.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to Red Coupons at any time, for any reason, including suspected violation of these Terms.

sections.heading: 10. Governing Law
sections.text: These Terms are governed by the laws of the United States of America, without regard to conflict of law principles.

sections.heading: 11. Changes to These Terms
sections.text: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes have been made constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact_us.heading: 12. Contact Us
contact_us.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

privacy_policy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: At Red Coupons, your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.text:
We collect the following personal information:

  • Email addresses voluntarily provided by users when subscribing to our services, creating accounts, or making purchases.

We do not collect names, phone numbers, addresses, or any sensitive personal information unless specifically provided for communication purposes.

sections.heading: 2. Payments and Financial Information
sections.text:
When you purchase coupons through Stripe or other secure payment gateways:

  • Payment processing is handled entirely by the third-party payment provider.
  • We do not store or have access to your credit card numbers, CVV codes or bank account details.
  • The only payment-related information we may receive is limited to transaction confirmations (e.g., status, amount paid, email used for payment).

For details on how your payment information is processed, we encourage you to review the privacy policy of the relevant payment provider.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.text:
We use the email addresses we collect to:

  • Send you promotional coupons and discounts.
  • Share updates about Red Coupons and our services.
  • Respond to customer support inquiries.

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: 4. Data Security
sections.text: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure. All payment transactions are encrypted and handled by secure third-party processors.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
sections.text: You may unsubscribe from our communications at any time using the link provided in our emails. You may also request the deletion of your email address from our system by contacting us at info@red-coupons.com.

sections.heading: 6. Changes to this Policy
sections.text: We may update this Privacy Policy as our services evolve. When we do, we will revise the "Last Updated" date above. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact_us.heading: 7. Contact Us
contact_us.intro: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please contact us at:

contact_us.heading: Contact Us
contact_us.description: We're here to help. Email us at info@red-coupons.com or fill out the form below. We'll get back to you shortly.
